user.title: Connect to No Longer Evil
user.description: How do you want to connect?

cloud.title: Connect to No Longer Evil Cloud
cloud.description: Enter your No Longer Evil API key. You can get an API key from your account settings at https://nolongerevil.com/settings

data_description.api_key: Your No Longer Evil API key (starts with 'nle_')
data_description.base_url: Leave as the default unless you have a custom cloud endpoint

self_hosted.title: Connect to a Self-Hosted Server
self_hosted.description: Enter the URL of your self-hosted No Longer Evil server's Control API. This is the same host you used as the Public API URL when flashing, on the Control API port (default 8082). No API key is required.

data_description.base_url: For example http://192.168.1.50:8082 — use your server's LAN IP, not localhost

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate No Longer Evil
reauth_confirm.description: Your API key is no longer valid. Please enter a new API key.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key. Please check your credentials.
error.invalid_url: That doesn't look like a valid URL. Use a full address like http://192.168.1.50:8082
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the No Longer Evil API. Please check your network connection.
error.no_devices: No devices found for this account. Please add a thermostat first.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll for updates (10-300 seconds)
